OBJECTIVE

Feature Freeze is now active.

Do not create new features.
Do not perform another full audit.
Do not modify completed modules unless a verified defect is found.

Only complete the final release process.

==================================================

âś“ Backend

iOS:

- App Store build configuration

- Deployment ID
